title: thelypteris telefominica
intro: Thelypteris telefominica, also known as the Telefomin maiden's hair fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Thelypteris telefominica include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and easing digestive problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts for its medicinal uses.
